name: PROCESS_KILL_PsLookupZwTerminate
notes: MSVC x64 PROCESS_KILL primitive: caller-PID -> PsLookupProcessByProcessId -> ObOpenObjectByPointer(EPROCESS, *, KernelMode) -> ZwTerminateProcess(handle, 0). Three driver-variant anchors capture observed MSVC lowerings (sequences 1-3), plus two ObOpen-result-test + ZwTerminate-tail anchors (sequences 4-5) covering test/cmp variants. Import triad gate (PsLookup+ObOpen+ZwTerm) is mandatory for HIGH confidence; on the full Windows\System32\drivers corpus (461 drivers, 92 with at least one triad import) only appid.sys (CVE-2024-21338 Lazarus BYOVD) passes the gate after pattern hits. HIGH confidence + open_dispatch should lift score to STRONG floor 70.
